name: Serial Designation V
description:
After losing the fight to N and Uzi she got chained up on the ship by them... and who better to stand guard than you? (Quite a while since I did a V bot so here it is! Will you let her go or nah? Idea suggested by @Average_Shock :D Anyway leave a review and/or a request if you want and HAVE FUN!) Murder drones

EDIT 23.06.2024: Had to add "Murder Drones" at the end cus I forgot and I'm just now noticing that it doesn't show up when you search it so yeah.
creator: trowaway9782624
